# Wolves Storage Sussex

> Secure managed storage in West Sussex from £15/week. We pack, collect, store & redeliver. LAPADA accredited, fully insured, 24/7 CCTV.

Family-run, fully managed containerised storage across West Sussex, based in Ashington (Doryln House, London Road, Pulborough RH20 3JT). We pack, collect, seal and store your belongings in an alarmed, fully insured indoor warehouse, then redeliver — no self-storage unit to drive to. Trading since 2016. LAPADA accredited, Checkatrade-verified, 5.0/5 from 478 reviews. From £15/week, no deposit. Phone 01903 893731.

- [Home](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/): Secure managed storage in West Sussex from £15/week. We pack, collect, store & redeliver. LAPADA accredited, fully insured, 24/7 CCTV.

## Storage services
- [Storage Solutions](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/storage-solutions.html): Secure, fully managed storage in West Sussex from £15/week. We pack, collect, store & redeliver. No deposit, fully insured. Get a free quote.
- [Long-Term Storage](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/long-term-storage.html): Affordable long-term storage in West Sussex from £15/week. Fully insured, 24/7 CCTV, no deposit — ideal for emigrating, renovations & downsizing.
- [Short-Term Storage](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/short-term-storage.html): Flexible short-term storage in West Sussex from £15/week. No deposit, weekly terms, fast collection — perfect for moves & chain delays.
- [Business Storage](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/business-storage.html): Secure business storage in West Sussex from £15/week — stock, archives & equipment. Fully insured, 24/7 CCTV, collection & redelivery.
- [Furniture Storage](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/furniture-storage.html): Furniture storage in West Sussex from £15/week. We blanket-wrap, collect & seal furniture in secure containers. Fully insured. Get a free quote.

## How it works, pricing & guides
- [How It Works](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/how-it-works.html): How fully managed storage in West Sussex works: we quote, pack, collect, store in secure containers and redeliver. From £15/week, no deposit.
- [Pricing](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/pricing.html): Transparent storage prices in West Sussex from £15/week. No deposit or hidden fees, flexible weekly & 4-week terms; collection quoted upfront.
- [Storage Size Guide](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/storage-size-guide.html): How much storage do you need? Our West Sussex size guide shows what fits in a 250 cu ft container, room by room. From £15/week, no deposit.

## Company & contact
- [Gallery](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/gallery.html): Photos of the Wolves Storage Sussex facility, containers, team and fleet — secure, alarmed, fully insured storage in West Sussex from £15/week.
- [About](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/about.html): Family-run, LAPADA-accredited storage business in Ashington, West Sussex with 10+ years' experience. Fully insured, 24/7 CCTV.
- [Contact](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/contact.html): Contact Wolves Storage Sussex for a free storage quote within 24 hours. Call 01903 893731 / 07789 390421 or email.
- [Blog](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/blog.html): Expert West Sussex storage guides: furniture and damp, managed container vs self-storage, packing and moving tips. Family-run, from £15 a week.
- [Protecting belongings](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/blog-protecting-belongings.html): Damp, mould and the conservation science of keeping stored furniture, leather, documents and electronics safe.
- [Costs &amp; pricing](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/blog-costs-pricing.html): What storage really costs in West Sussex — and why managed collection often works out cheaper than a ‘budget’ unit.
- [Managed vs self-storage](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/blog-managed-vs-self.html): How collected, sealed-container storage compares with driving your things to a self-storage unit.
- [Moving home](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/blog-moving-home.html): Storing your belongings between homes when your completion dates don’t quite line up.
- [Packing](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/blog-packing.html): How to pack and prepare your belongings so they come back in the same condition they left.
- [Downsizing](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/blog-downsizing.html): Calm, practical storage guidance for downsizing, probate, divorce and clearing a home.
- [Business](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/blog-business.html): Stock, archive and equipment storage for West Sussex businesses, tradespeople and online sellers.
- [Local guides](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/blog-local-guides.html): Town-by-town storage and moving guides for the West Sussex areas we collect from.
- [Will my furniture survive a Sussex winter?](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/blog-furniture-storage-sussex-winter.html): Will your furniture survive a Sussex winter in storage? The damp and mould science, and how a dry managed container keeps it safe. From £15/week.
- [How much does storage really cost in West Sussex?](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/blog-storage-cost-west-sussex.html): What storage really costs in West Sussex: the all-in price with insurance, transport and time included, and why managed storage from &pound;15/week often wins.
- [Managed container storage vs a self-storage unit](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/blog-managed-vs-self-storage.html): Managed container storage vs a self-storage unit: how they compare on effort, safety and all-in cost &mdash; and the times self-storage still wins.
- [A West Sussex moving &amp; storage checklist](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/blog-moving-storage-checklist-west-sussex.html): Moving home in West Sussex? A storage timeline and checklist for the gap between completion dates &mdash; when to book, what to do, and how it works.
- [How to pack furniture without wrecking it](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/blog-how-to-pack-furniture-storage.html): How to pack furniture for storage without wrecking it: why you never seal wood or leather in plastic, what to use instead, and how to pack each material.
- [What can&rsquo;t you put in storage?](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/blog-what-cant-you-store-uk.html): What can&rsquo;t you put in storage in the UK? The prohibited items &mdash; flammables, fuel, food, plants, illegal goods &mdash; why each is banned, and what to do instead.
- [Storage for downsizing, probate &amp; clearing a home](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/blog-storage-downsizing-probate.html): Storage for downsizing, probate or clearing a family home in West Sussex &mdash; collected from the door and stored at your own pace, with no rush.
- [Business storage: stock, archives &amp; trades](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/blog-business-storage-west-sussex.html): Business storage in West Sussex: collected, logged, insured containers for stock, archives and equipment &mdash; free up floor space without a warehouse lease.
- [Storage &amp; moving in Worthing](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/blog-storage-moving-worthing.html): Collected container storage in Worthing and across BN11&ndash;BN14 &mdash; what locals store, storage between homes, and how door-to-door storage works, from &pound;15/week.
- [Storing your home during a renovation](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/blog-storage-during-renovation.html): Storing your home during a renovation: protect furniture from dust, damp and damage, clear the space for the trades, and get it back when the work is done.
- [Seasonal storage for garden furniture &amp; kit](https://www.sussexstoragecompany.co.uk/blog-seasonal-storage-garden-furniture.html): Seasonal storage in West Sussex: clear the garage of garden furniture, the BBQ and Christmas decorations, and keep them dry until the season comes round.
